Kathryn Canale Esq of Bradley Gmelich (818-243-5200) for Universal Services of America Defendant and moving party through Court Call.
Allison Hurley Esq of Bremer Whyte Brown & Omeara, LLP for Crown Building Maintenance, Defendant through Court Call.
No other appearance on the matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL SERVICES OF AMERICA GP, INC.'s Joint Notice Of Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff Robin Jeanie Smith is Off calendar as duplicate entry. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Resetting Joint Motion To Compel Deposition Of Pltff Robin Jeanie Smith
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Kathryn Canale Esq of Bradley Gmelich (818-243-5200) for Universal Services of America Defendant and moving party through Court Call.
Allison Hurley Esq of Bremer Whyte Brown & Omeara, LLP for Crown Building Maintenance, Defendant through Court Call.
No other appearance on the matter.

ARGUED. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL SERVICES OF AMERICA GP, INC.'s Joint Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff Robin Jeanie Smith is granted. No opposition filed; motion granted. Plaintiff shall appear for a continued deposition at a mutually agreed upon date no later than September 12, 2014.Plaintiff is ordered to pay sanctions in the amount of $350 to UPS by September 12, 2014.All other requests for sanctions are denied. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form by email to the Judge Pro Tem. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Jonathan A. Kaplan, Esq. of Bremer Whyte Brown & O'Meara LLP, Tel. 949.221.1000, for defendant/cross defendant Crown Building Maintenance, via Court Call;
